description_long: This is a simple, rustic wooden ladder with two vertical side rails and four evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The wood appears to have a dark brown finish, with visible grain patterns that give it a natural, handcrafted look. The rungs are slightly rounded and securely joined to the side rails, providing stable footholds. The ladder lacks any visible metal reinforcements, anti-slip feet, or additional safety features, suggesting a traditional design. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it suitable for use in garages, backyards, or for accessing low rooftops or shelves. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on basic function rather than decorative elements.
description: A dark brown wooden ladder with four rungs and a simple, rustic design. It features rounded side rails and no visible safety features.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the thinness of the ladder and the protruding rungs.
description_view_1: A full frontal view displaying the four horizontal rungs and the rounded wooden side rails.
description_view_2: Another side profile, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the ladder's slim structure.
description_view_3: A rear view of the ladder, showing the back of the rungs and the continuous side rails.
